prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3391f8c0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `3391f8c0` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: find the two non-background 8-connected object families, take one normalized prototype per color, and redraw every object at its original upper-left anchor using the other family’s prototype and color.

The summary hint was discarded. Both hint files collapsed the task into a plain color swap, but the official examples change occupied cells and require family-level prototype swapping instead. No new shared primitive was needed; everything stays task-local in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3391f8c0/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3391f8c0/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3391f8c0/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3391f8c0/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3391f8c0/notes.md).

Validation is complete: `5/5` official examples passed, the shared builder produced 1000 examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples passed verification. I also checked the preview sheet visually; it stays on-family with sparse two-color motif placements and repeated prototype families. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3391f8c0/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3391f8c0/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3391f8c0/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3391f8c0/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3391f8c0/previews/preview_03.png).
